name: Business Case Simulation
description: A live business case simulation in the style of a consulting interview or MBA case competition. The session presents a structured business problem, guides the participant through hypothesis formation, analysis, and recommendation, and produces a performance debrief assessing structured thinking, quantitative reasoning, and communication clarity.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Business Case Debrief
types.description: Generated business case debrief from intake session data.
